creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Sorry, but this change is wrong.  This port is not inherently i386-only, 
it is simply broken.  Desclaring it as only for i386 would hide the 
issue instead of exposing it so one day it might get fixed.  I would 
rather appreciate a patch to unbreak it on all arches.  :-)
